name: Sri Lakshmi Saraswathi Textiles (Arni) Limited
summary: Sri Lakshmi Saraswathi Textiles (Arni) Limited is an Indian textile company, currently undergoing liquidation. The company was previously engaged in the production of yarn and fabric. Sri Lakshmi Saraswathi Textiles (Arni) Limited is based in Arni, Tamil Nadu, India.
